caption: A green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) is parked indoors on a concrete floor, positioned diagonally facing toward the right. The vehicle features a prominent front cargo rack, a protective black metal brush guard, and a headlight mounted atop the green bodywork. Large, knobby off-road tires are visible, and a partial view of another similar green vehicle is seen behind it. In the background, various tools and equipment are stored against the wall, including what appears to be a red tool cart. No people are present in the scene. Across the sequence of images, the camera remains stationary and the ATV does not move, resulting in a static view of the vehicle. There is no legible on-screen text or logos visible on the equipment or the walls.
